confidence: MEDIUM (corroboration) / NONE (new boss). GENUINE ROTF multi-dungeon run. Value = corroboration of base Malphas + a /25 event-feed (Warbringer/Ghost Ship counters; reinforces build-variant counter) + confirms built bosses (Warbringer/Uvuvwuwuwe) appear as realm events. No new buildable content. Recorded honestly. Best follow-up: a clean single-boss clip if the 'Kill my protectors' line is wanted (base Abyss, low priority).
